title: ardisia gasingoides
intro: Ardisia gasingoides, also known as the "False Curry Leaf," is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. Traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ardisia gasingoides include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tonics, and are often combined with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
